agent_note: Paste into Cursor, Claude Code, Copilot, or any AI assistant. Each prompt points the agent at the official docs so it doesn't guess.

categories.heading: Render on the server: RSC, SSR, streaming.
Move an existing setup to React on Rails.
Tune performance and ship with Pro.

prompts.title: Start a new app
prompts.prompt: Set up a new Rails app with React on Rails, using TypeScript and server-side rendering. Follow the official guide at https://reactonrails.com/docs/getting-started/create-react-on-rails-app and use the exact commands and versions it specifies — don't improvise.

prompts.title: Add to an existing Rails app
prompts.prompt: Add React on Rails to my existing Rails app with TypeScript, keeping my current routes and conventions. Follow https://reactonrails.com/docs/getting-started/existing-rails-app and don't change any gem or package versions it doesn't tell you to.

prompts.title: Turn on React Server Components
prompts.prompt: Turn on React Server Components in my React on Rails app (no license required). Follow https://reactonrails.com/docs/pro/react-server-components exactly, including the renderer and packer setup it specifies.

prompts.title: Add streaming SSR
prompts.prompt: Add streaming server-side rendering to my React on Rails app. Follow https://reactonrails.com/docs/pro/streaming-ssr exactly and don't change versions it doesn't ask you to.

prompts.title: Use async/Suspense rendering
prompts.prompt: Set up async (Suspense) rendering for a React on Rails component. Follow https://reactonrails.com/docs/api-reference/ruby-api-pro#async_react_componentcomponent_name-options-- exactly.

prompts.title: Migrate from react-rails
prompts.prompt: Migrate my app from react-rails to React on Rails, keeping my existing components working. Follow https://reactonrails.com/docs/migrating/migrating-from-react-rails and don't skip any step it lists.

prompts.title: Add code splitting
prompts.prompt: Add code splitting / lazy loading to my React on Rails components. Follow https://reactonrails.com/docs/building-features/code-splitting exactly.

prompts.title: Evaluate OSS vs Pro
prompts.prompt: Review my React on Rails setup and tell me whether OSS or Pro fits my workload, citing the tradeoffs. Base your answer on https://reactonrails.com/docs/getting-started/oss-vs-pro.

prompts.title: Set up the Node renderer
prompts.prompt: Set up the React on Rails Pro Node renderer for server rendering. Follow https://reactonrails.com/docs/pro/node-renderer exactly, including the configuration it specifies.

prompts.title: Add fragment caching
prompts.prompt: Add fragment caching to my server-rendered React on Rails components. Follow https://reactonrails.com/docs/pro/fragment-caching exactly.

prompts.title: Get a production license / upgrade to Pro
prompts.prompt: Walk me through upgrading my React on Rails app to Pro and getting a production license. Follow https://reactonrails.com/docs/pro/upgrading-to-pro.
